description_long: This is a rounded ceramic cup with a soft blue gradient exterior and a white interior. The cup features a whimsical illustration of a white cat with closed eyes, a blue scarf, and surrounded by floating bubbles, giving it a playful and cozy appearance. The handle is robust and angular, attached to one side, and is colored in the same blue as the cup body. The surface finish is matte, with a smooth tactile quality and minimal gloss. There are no visible logos or branding, but the decorative cat motif is prominent on one side. The cup appears lightweight and suitable for holding hot or cold beverages.
description: A blue ceramic cup with a matte finish, featuring a cute white cat illustration and a sturdy handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cat illustration, bubbles, and the handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and no visible illustration, only bubbles.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting both the handle and the cat illustration on the cup's side.
description_view_3: Side view with the handle out of sight and only a partial view of the decorative pattern.
